title: Paper Tales San Diego
excerpt: The last time I was in San Diego teaching, I was pregnant. Very pregnant, if there is such a thing. You can see evidence of that in this post. Other than that, the classes were much the same - great…
body:
The last time I was in San Diego teaching, I was pregnant. Very pregnant, if there is such a thing. You can see evidence of that in this post. Other than that, the classes were much the same - great people, good times, in a completely creative setting. If you are a fan of paper and are in San Diego, I highly recommend a visit to Paper Tales.

Yes, that is baby Jack (mohawk and all) in my arms and a donut in Kelly's. So appropriate and adorable.

Loved seeing familiar faces and meeting new ones - some who drove from far away! Once again, if you're on Instagram,we added more photos to the existing #amyKPsandiego. Thanks again Michelle - we had a blast! PS- there are just 2 spaces left for my April 12th workshop in Santa Ana- check the sidebar to sign up!
